competitor.name: Competitor
competitor.description: Lives for match day — trains harder before a big tournament than a normal week.

perfectionist.name: Perfectionist
perfectionist.description: Never satisfied — every win gets picked apart for what could've gone better.

optimist.name: Optimist
optimist.description: Always sees the next tournament as the one that turns the season around.

pessimist.name: Pessimist
pessimist.description: Expects the setback before it even happens — rarely gives up for real, but never celebrates either.

ice_cold.name: Ice-Cold
ice_cold.description: Pulse never rises, no matter the score or the crowd.

nervous.name: Nervous
nervous.description: Sleeps worse the night before a big match.

stubborn.name: Stubborn
stubborn.description: Never changes tactics halfway through, no matter how it's going.

patient.name: Patient
patient.description: Thinks in years, not weeks — never panics after one bad month.

impulsive.name: Impulsive
impulsive.description: Decides in the moment — switches tactics, destinations, or racket on a whim.

self_critical.name: Self-Critical
self_critical.description: A single mistake can sour the whole day, even after a win.

family_oriented.name: Family-Oriented
family_oriented.description: Counting down to the flight home before it's even landed — long tours cost more than they give back.

social.name: Social
social.description: Knows everyone in the locker room within a day, in any country.

lone_wolf.name: Lone Wolf
lone_wolf.description: Prefers a single hotel room and a quiet trip over team bonding.

frugal.name: Frugal
frugal.description: Always books the cheapest option — even when it makes the trip a little rougher.

spendthrift.name: Spendthrift
spendthrift.description: Money flows out as fast as it comes in — best hotel, best gear, every time.

morning_person.name: Morning Person
morning_person.description: Sharpest before noon — early sessions feel easiest.

night_owl.name: Night Owl
night_owl.description: Never really wakes up until the afternoon — evening sessions feel best.

adventurous.name: Adventurous
adventurous.description: Always says yes to a faraway tournament — the more exotic, the better.

homebody.name: Homebody
homebody.description: Most comfortable on home turf — away trips never quite feel like home.

party_animal.name: Party Animal
party_animal.description: Tournament nights rarely end early — the locker room's favorite, form's enemy.

workhorse.name: Workhorse
workhorse.description: An extra session is never a problem — more like the rule.

lazy.name: Lazy
lazy.description: Motivates best by putting today's training off until tomorrow.

fast_learner.name: Fast Learner
fast_learner.description: Picks up new technique in a couple of sessions — coaches struggle to keep up.

gear_nerd.name: Gear Nerd
gear_nerd.description: Spends almost as much time on equipment as on play — the latest racket, the right rubbers.

gym_rat.name: Gym Rat
gym_rat.description: Physical training is never a chore — the gym is almost as fun as the court.

natural_talent.name: Natural Talent
natural_talent.description: Some movements have always felt natural, like the body already knew how.

late_bloomer.name: Late Bloomer
late_bloomer.description: The development curve points up late — the breakthrough is coming, just not yet.

creature_of_habit.name: Creature of Habit
creature_of_habit.description: Same warm-up, same order, every time — deviations break the focus.

experimental.name: Experimental
experimental.description: Happy to test new grips and tactics mid-season, just to see.

easily_distracted.name: Easily Distracted
easily_distracted.description: Focus drifts mid-session — a phone, noise from the next court, anything at all.

clutch.name: Clutch
clutch.description: Raises the level when it matters most — a deciding point feels like an opportunity, not a threat.

choker.name: Choker
choker.description: Leads have a habit of shrinking once the finish line comes into view.

aggressive.name: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Always looking to seize the initiative — a risky winner over a safe return, every time.

defensive.name: Defensive
defensive.description: Would rather win on the opponent's mistake than on a winner of their own.

risk_taker.name: Risk-Taker
risk_taker.description: Goes for the tough angle even when a simpler shot is on offer.

safe_player.name: Safe Player
safe_player.description: Always plays the safe ball — a long rally over an unforced risk.

crowd_favorite.name: Crowd Favorite
crowd_favorite.description: The stands are always on their side, home or away.

referee_rattled.name: Referee-Rattled
referee_rattled.description: One questionable call can wreck the concentration for the rest of the match.

slow_starter.name: Slow Starter
slow_starter.description: The first set is rarely the best one — the match takes time to get going.

strong_finisher.name: Strong Finisher
strong_finisher.description: The final set is where it's really decided — that's when the best level shows up.

iron_health.name: Iron Health
iron_health.description: Has never missed a season to injury.

bad_knees.name: Bad Knees
bad_knees.description: Stairs and hard courts ache after a long tournament weekend.

glass_shoulder.name: Glass Shoulder
glass_shoulder.description: The shoulder has its own schedule for acting up, usually mid-season.

slow_recovery.name: Slow Recovery
slow_recovery.description: The body takes its own sweet time after a tough match, no matter how much rest gets thrown at it.

explosive.name: Explosive
explosive.description: First step is always the fastest in the room.

enduring.name: Enduring
enduring.description: The fifth set feels as strong as the first.

late_developer.name: Late Developer
late_developer.description: Physical peak is still further out than for most people the same age.

injury_prone.name: Injury-Prone
injury_prone.description: Seems to pick up more small niggles than most, year after year.

flexible.name: Flexible
flexible.description: Mobility makes the tough angles feel rarely impossible.

stiff.name: Stiff
stiff.description: The warm-up always needs to run a little longer than it does for teammates.
